title: AI/ML driven ASIC Design and Implementation Principal Automation Engineer
company_focus:
Semiconductor company designing Edge-AI, Automotive
Processors and Advanced microcontrollers
description:
Job Description



As an “Principal AI/ML driven ASIC Design and Implementation
Automation Engineer”, you will work in a dynamic environment
to explore methodology, flows and tools to improve
efficiency and quality of results (power, performance, area,
and verification) for SoC and IP development teams across
the organization. You'll be working and connecting with
AI/ML and automation experts in the industry to explore
state-of-the-art AI/ML CAD techniques as a part of VLSI CAD
SW, prescribe key methods and requirements for tools &
features to leverage for ASIC design.



In this role, you will work & develop prototype solutions to
evaluate various state-of-the-art AI/ML techniques to
identify the best solutions in close collaboration with
Architecture, IP design, SoC Design, Verification,
Implementation and Design Enablement teams to drive new ways
of working, improvements to current ways of working,
addressing design quality challenges and continuously
improve NXP Semiconductors design, verification and
implementation flows. While developing these new ways of
working, successful candidates will be working on actual
designs and implementation to pilot and develop the
automation.



This opportunity is to enable Digital Transformation to
leverage state-of-the-art AI/ML ideas to improve NXP designs
for the Edge-AI, Automotive Processors and Advanced
microcontrollers in NXP. Successful candidate will be
working in a fast-paced engineering environment, on a
leading-edge advanced node technologies enabling automated
building of exciting and complex SoCs.



Job Summary



Explore research ideas and solutions that bring AI/ML
applications to VLSI design Work closely with Academic
research communities in AI/ML for VLSI design, Architecture
teams, IP and SoC designers and SoC Implementation teams
from multiple sites to explore and evaluate for leading edge
SoC technologies serving multiple industries These
automation applications include use of GenAI, Reinforcement
Learning, Graph Neural Networks, and convolutional Networks
Strong AI/ML expertise and software background required



Job Qualifications



BS or MS in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering,
Computer Engineering or related disciplines with strong
background in SW development 12+ years of experience in
developing complex SW projects, and hands-on expertise in
programming using Python & C++ Hands on experience in
Unix/Linux, revision control (Git, BitBucket), SW
development and debug tools Excellent analytical problem
solving skills Strong verbal and written communication
skills



Desirable skills/experience:



Data structures, algorithms and SW development for
optimization problems. Prior experience in VLSI CAD
methodology and tool development Understanding or prior
experience with EDA tools for design, verification, DFT and
implementation Strong understanding of design, layout,
constraints (SDC, Clocks, CDC, RDC), Static timing analysis,
Low-power and Power-aware flows (UPF) Experience with Design
revision control (GIT, DesignSync) and Make Splunk, Jenkins,
LSF and CI/CD process

More information about NXP in India...

responsibilities: Explore methodology, flows and tools to improve efficiency and quality of results for SoC and IP development
Develop prototype solutions to evaluate state-of-the-art AI/ML techniques for VLSI CAD applications
Collaborate with Architecture, IP design, SoC Design, Verification and Implementation teams
Work with academic research communities in AI/ML for VLSI design
Prescribe key methods and requirements for tools and features to leverage for ASIC design
Pilot and develop automation on actual designs and implementations
Drive improvements to design, verification and implementation flows
use_cases: VLSI CAD software optimization using AI/ML techniques
ASIC design automation and quality improvement
Power, performance, and area optimization for SoCs
Design enablement for Edge-AI and Automotive processors
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on applying traditional ML/DL techniques
(reinforcement learning, graph neural networks,
convolutional networks) to VLSI CAD/EDA tools and ASIC
design optimization. While GenAI is mentioned, the primary
focus is on ML-driven optimization for chip design rather
than building LLM/agent systems.
